query:
DO $$ BEGIN
  IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_type WHERE typname = 'maintenance_status') THEN
    CREATE TYPE maintenance_status AS ENUM ('em_andamento', 'concluida');
  END IF;
END $$;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bike_sizes (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  "bikeId" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES bikes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  tamanho VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "quantidadeTotal" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  "quantidadeDisponivel" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  observacao TEXT,
  "createdAt" TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bike_maintenance_logs (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  "bikeId" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES bikes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  descricao TEXT NOT NULL,
  custo NUMERIC(10,2),
  "dataEntrada" TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
  "dataPrevistaRetorno" TIMESTAMP,
  status maintenance_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'em_andamento',
  fotos JSONB,
  "createdAt" TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
  "updatedAt" TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);
